meta.title: Vono Studio — Architecture, Interiors, Construction
meta.description: Vono Studio is an award-winning design practice working across architecture, interior design, urban design and construction.
projects.title: Projects
services.title: What we do
studio.title: Studio
studio.p1: Vono Studio is a young, dynamic design practice working across architecture, interior design, urban design and brand identity. We manage the entire journey from concept to built environment under one roof.
studio.p2: Awards earned in national and international competitions reflect our commitment to sustainable, context-sensitive solutions at every scale. For us, each project is a new relationship between place, people and time.
